history.text: The field does not need harder benchmarks. It needs evaluation systems that are structurally indifferent to being optimized against.

MMLU was not too easy in 2020. It became too easy as the optimization capacity pointed at it grew. The evaluation did not change. The relationship between the evaluation and the thing being evaluated changed.

What makes Chess Elo, formal proofs, and AlphaFold evaluations durable? The gap between satisfying the evaluation and actually doing the task is zero. There is no exploit surface because the evaluation and the capability collapse into the same thing.
